diagrams.title: /etc/passwd File Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the structure of /etc/passwd with sample entries for root, system users, and regular users
elements: 7 field labels: Username, Password, UID, GID, GECOS, Home, Shell
diagrams.purpose: Understanding format and typical UID ranges for different user types

diagrams.title: User Authentication Flow
diagrams.description: Flow diagram showing how login process uses passwd and shadow files
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the complete authentication mechanism and security flow

diagrams.title: UID Classification in Linux
diagrams.description: Visual representation of UID ranges and their purposes
diagrams.purpose: Memorizing UID allocation scheme in Linux systems
